toolCall.argumentsJson: {"CommandLine":"powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command \"Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\DELL\\.gemini\\antigravity\\brain\\e2ce67ec-d36e-4d6a-b7d1-a7103081bfc8\\.system_generated\\logs\\transcript.jsonl' | Where-Object { $_ -like '*asset.js*' -and ($_ -like '*write_to_file*' -or $_ -like '*replace_file_content*') } | ForEach-Object { $data = ConvertFrom-Json $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($data -and $data.tool_calls) { Write-Host 'Step:' $data.step_index 'Tool:' $data.tool_calls[0].name } }\"","Cwd":"C:\\Users\\DELL\\.gemini\\antigravity\\scratch\\master-construction-portal","WaitMsBeforeAsync":5000,"toolAction":"Listing asset.js edit steps in logs","toolSummary":"List asset.js edits in logs"}
